{{ $cur := .Site.Params.version }} {{ $latest := .Site.Params.latest }} {{ $versions := .Site.Data.versions.versions }} {{/* Render wherever there's more than one version to switch between. Every build, including main (browsable at main.docs.modelplane.ai), serves real content, so all of them carry the switcher. */}} {{ if and $versions (gt (len $versions) 1) }} {{/* Each version is served from its own subdomain (e.g. v0-1.docs.modelplane.ai), so baseURL has no path component and RelPermalink is already root-relative. */}} {{ $pagePath := .RelPermalink }} {{/* "Latest" when explicitly marked or when no release exists yet. */}} {{ $isLatest := or (not $latest) (eq $cur $latest) }}
Version
{{ range $versions }} {{ $isActive := eq .version $cur }} {{ $label := cond (ne .version "main") (printf "v%s" .version) "main" }} {{ $href := $.RelPermalink }} {{ if not $isActive }} {{ if .url }} {{ $href = printf "%s%s" .url $pagePath }} {{ else }} {{ $href = $pagePath }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ $label }} {{ if and $latest (eq .version $latest) }}Latest{{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ end }}
